# awscc_apigatewayv2_stage (Resource)

Resource Type definition for AWS::ApiGatewayV2::Stage



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_id` (String)
- `stage_name` (String)

### Optional

- `access_log_settings` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--access_log_settings))
- `auto_deploy` (Boolean)
- `client_certificate_id` (String)
- `default_route_settings` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--default_route_settings))
- `deployment_id` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `route_settings` (String)
- `stage_variables` (String)
- `tags` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.
- `stage_id` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--access_log_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `access_log_settings`

Optional:

- `destination_arn` (String)
- `format` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--default_route_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_route_settings`

Optional:

- `data_trace_enabled` (Boolean)
- `detailed_metrics_enabled` (Boolean)
- `logging_level` (String)
- `throttling_burst_limit` (Number)
- `throttling_rate_limit` (Number)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_apigatewayv2_stage.example
  identity = {
    id = "id"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `id` (String)

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_apigatewayv2_stage.example
  id = "id"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_apigatewayv2_stage.example "id"
```
